description: Studio City International Holdings Limited provides provision of services pursuant to a casino contract and the hospitality business in Macau. It operates gaming services, a casino contract for the operation of studio city casino, focusing on mass market and premium mass market table games and gaming machines, including baccarat, three-card baccarat, blackjack, craps, caribbean stud poker, roulette, sic bo, fortune 3 card poker, and other games; hospitality services; dining services; event and convention services; other services; leasing services; and resort, which offers various non-gaming at
